role_in_text: Collaborating with SpinQ to construct quantum AI models for intelligent commercial banking decisions.
occurrence_sentence: Based on SpinQ's real quantum computer, Longying Zhida , a wholly-owned technology company of Huaxia Bank, cooperated with SpinQ to build a quantum neural network model to provide a basis for judgement on whether to remove ATM machines and to help commercial banks' intelligent decision-making and the digital transformation of operation and management.

role_in_text: Researchers at SpinQ have proposed a new quantum-based gradient computation method.
occurrence_sentence: Researchers at SpinQ have proposed a new quantum-based gradient computation method that takes advantage of the high parallelism of quantum computing to obtain the numerical gradient results of multivariate functions with only one computation, providing an efficient solution to the parameter optimisation problem.

mentions.role_in_text: Researchers at SpinQ have proposed a new quantum-based gradient computation method.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Researchers at SpinQ have proposed a new quantum-based gradient computation method that takes advantage of the high parallelism of quantum computing to obtain the numerical gradient results of multivariate functions with only one computation, providing an efficient solution to the parameter optimisation problem.
